vec2 LTC_Uv( const in vec3 N, const in vec3 V, const in float roughness ) {

\xb7 Right-drag to pan"})]})]})}PYi(".csdm-scene-container {
 flex: 1;
 position: relative;
 overflow: hidden;
 background: #060a18;
}

.csdm-3d-viewport {
 width: 100%;
 height: 100%;
 cursor: grab;
}

.csdm-3d-viewport:active {
 cursor: grabbing;
}

.csdm-3d-viewport canvas {
 display: block;
 width: 100% !important;
 height: 100% !important;
}

.csdm-tooltip {
 position: absolute;
 padding: 8px 14px;
 background: rgba(6, 10, 24, 0.95);
 border: 1px solid #4488ff;
 border-radius: 6px;
 color: #e0e6ff;
 font-size: 12px;
 pointer-events: none;
 white-space: nowrap;
 z-index: 100;
 box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
}

.csdm-focus-badge {
 position: absolute;
 top: 12px;
 left: 50%;
 transform: translateX(-50%);
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 8px;
 padding: 8px 16px;
 background: rgba(6, 10, 24, 0.92);
 border: 1px solid #00e5ff;
 border-radius: 8px;
 color: #b0c8ff;
 font-size: 13px;
 box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.2);
 z-index: 50;
}

.csdm-focus-badge__icon {
 font-size: 16px;
}

.csdm-focus-badge__text strong {
 color: #00e5ff;
}

.csdm-focus-badge__clear {
 margin-left: 8px;
 padding: 3px 10px;
 border: 1px solid #ff5252;
 border-radius: 4px;
 background: transparent;
 color: #ff5252;
 font-size: 11px;
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: all 0.2s;
}

.csdm-focus-badge__clear:hover {
 background: #ff5252;
 color: #fff;
}

.csdm-scene-legend {
 position: absolute;
 bottom: 12px;
 left: 12px;
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 16px;
 padding: 8px 14px;
 background: rgba(6, 10, 24, 0.9);
 border: 1px solid #1a2550;
 border-radius: 6px;
 font-size: 11px;
 color: #8892b0;
}

.csdm-legend-item {
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 5px;
}

.csdm-dot {
 display: inline-block;
 width: 8px;
 height: 8px;
 border-radius: 50%;
}

.csdm-dot--good {
 background: #00e676;
}

.csdm-dot--low {
 background: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-dot--empty {
 background: #ff5252;
}

.csdm-legend-hint {
 color: #555e7a;
 font-style: italic;
 margin-left: 8px;

 width: 340px;
 background: #0d1230;
 border-left: 1px solid #2a3060;
 overflow-y: auto;
 padding: 16px;
 flex-shrink: 0;
}

.csdm-sidebar__empty {
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 justify-content: center;
 height: 100%;
 color: #6b7394;
 text-align: center;
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-btn-wrapper {
 margin-bottom: 16px;
 padding-bottom: 12px;
 border-bottom: 1px solid #2a3060;
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-btn {
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 8px;
 width: 100%;
 padding: 12px 16px;
 border: 2px solid #4488ff;
 border-radius: 8px;
 background: rgba(68, 136, 255, 0.1);
 color: #4488ff;
 font-size: 14px;
 font-weight: 600;
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-btn:hover {
 background: #4488ff;
 color: #fff;
 box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(68, 136, 255, 0.3);
 transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-btn:active {
 transform: translateY(0);
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-icon {
 font-size: 18px;
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-hint {
 display: block;
 margin-top: 6px;
 font-size: 11px;
 color: #6b7394;
}

.csdm-sidebar__table-view-hint strong {
 color: #82b1ff;
 font-family: "SF Mono", Monaco, monospace;
}

.csdm-panel {
 margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.csdm-panel__title {
 font-size: 14px;
 font-weight: 600;
 color: #fff;
 margin-bottom: 12px;
 padding-bottom: 8px;
 border-bottom: 1px solid #2a3060;
}

.csdm-panel__subtitle {
 font-size: 12px;
 font-weight: 600;
 color: #8892b0;
 margin: 12px 0 8px;
}

.csdm-panel__content {
 font-size: 12px;
}

.csdm-detail-row {
 display: flex;
 justify-content: space-between;
 padding: 6px 0;
 border-bottom: 1px solid #1a2040;
}

.csdm-detail-label {
 color: #6b7394;
}

.csdm-detail-value {
 color: #e0e6ff;
 font-weight: 500;
}

.csdm-detail-desc {
 color: #8892b0;
 margin: 8px 0;
 font-size: 11px;
 line-height: 1.4;
}

.csdm-detail-rec {
 color: #00bcd4;
 font-size: 11px;
 margin-top: 8px;
 padding: 8px;
 background: #0a1520;
 border-radius: 4px;
 line-height: 1.5;
}

.csdm-detail-csdm-desc {
 color: #a0aac4;
 font-size: 12px;
 line-height: 1.5;
 margin-bottom: 12px;
 padding: 10px;
 background: #111832;
 border-radius: 4px;
 border-left: 3px solid #4488ff;
}

.csdm-detail-mono {
 font-family: "SF Mono", Monaco, monospace;
 font-size: 11px;
 background: #1a2040;
 padding: 2px 6px;
 border-radius: 3px;
}

.csdm-detail-grid {
 margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.csdm-detail-hint {
 color: #555e7a;
 font-size: 10px;
 font-style: italic;
 margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.csdm-detail-section {
 margin-top: 14px;
 padding-top: 10px;
 border-top: 1px solid #1a2040;
}

.csdm-rel-detail-list {
 list-style: none;
 margin: 4px 0;
}

.csdm-rel-detail-item {
 padding: 6px 10px;
 margin: 4px 0;
 background: #111832;
 border-radius: 4px;
 font-size: 11px;
 color: #7db8ff;
 border-left: 3px solid #4488ff;
 line-height: 1.4;
}

.csdm-severity {
 padding: 2px 8px;
 border-radius: 3px;
 font-size: 10px;
 font-weight: 700;
 text-transform: uppercase;
}

.csdm-severity--high {
 background: rgba(255, 23, 68, 0.1333333333);
 color: #ff4444;
}

.csdm-severity--medium {
 background: rgba(255, 136, 0, 0.1333333333);
 color: #ff8800;
}

.csdm-severity--low {
 background: rgba(255, 171, 0, 0.1333333333);
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-health {
 padding: 2px 8px;
 border-radius: 3px;
 font-size: 10px;
 font-weight: 700;
}

.csdm-health--good {
 background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.1333333333);
 color: #00e676;
}

.csdm-health--low {
 background: rgba(255, 171, 0, 0.1333333333);
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-health--empty {
 background: rgba(255, 23, 68, 0.1333333333);
 color: #ff1744;
}

.csdm-domain-card {
 margin-bottom: 12px;
 padding: 8px;
 background: #1a2040;
 border-radius: 4px;
}

.csdm-domain-header {
 display: flex;
 justify-content: space-between;

}

.csdm-domain-name {
 font-weight: 600;
 color: #e0e6ff;
 font-size: 12px;
}

.csdm-domain-count {
 color: #4488ff;

}

.csdm-domain-bar {

 overflow: hidden;
}

.csdm-domain-bar__fill {

 transition: width 0.5s;
}

.csdm-class-list {
 list-style: none;
 margin-top: 8px;
}

.csdm-class-item {
 display: flex;
 justify-content: space-between;
 padding: 3px 6px;
 font-size: 11px;
 border-radius: 2px;
 margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.csdm-class-item--good {
 color: #00e676;
}

.csdm-class-item--low {
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-class-item--empty {
 color: #ff1744;
 opacity: 0.6;
}

.csdm-risk-summary {
 display: flex;
 gap: 12px;
 margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.csdm-risk-stat {
 text-align: center;
 flex: 1;
 padding: 8px;
 background: #1a2040;
 border-radius: 4px;
}

.csdm-risk-stat__value {
 display: block;
 font-size: 18px;
 font-weight: 700;
}

.csdm-risk-stat__label {
 font-size: 10px;
 color: #6b7394;
}

.csdm-risk-stat--high .csdm-risk-stat__value {
 color: #ff4444;
}

.csdm-risk-stat--medium .csdm-risk-stat__value {
 color: #ff8800;
}

.csdm-risk-stat--low .csdm-risk-stat__value {
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-risk-list {
 list-style: none;
}

.csdm-risk-item {
 padding: 8px;
 margin-bottom: 6px;
 background: #1a2040;
 border-radius: 4px;
 border-left: 3px solid #ff8800;
}

.csdm-risk-item--high {
 border-left-color: #ff4444;
}

.csdm-risk-item__header {
 display: flex;
 gap: 8px;
 align-items: center;
 margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.csdm-risk-item__type {
 color: #8892b0;
 font-size: 11px;
}

.csdm-risk-item__desc {
 color: #e0e6ff;
 font-size: 11px;
 line-height: 1.3;
}

.csdm-risk-item__rec {
 color: #00bcd4;
 font-size: 10px;
 margin-top: 4px;
}

.csdm-rel-stats {
 display: flex;
 gap: 8px;
 margin-bottom: 12px;
 flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.csdm-rel-stat {
 text-align: center;
 flex: 1;
 min-width: 60px;
 padding: 6px;
 background: #1a2040;
 border-radius: 4px;
}

.csdm-rel-stat__value {
 display: block;
 font-size: 16px;
 font-weight: 700;
 color: #4488ff;
}

.csdm-rel-stat__label {
 font-size: 9px;
 color: #6b7394;
}

.csdm-rel-stat--good .csdm-rel-stat__value {
 color: #00e676;
}

.csdm-rel-stat--warning .csdm-rel-stat__value {
 color: #ff8800;
}

.csdm-rel-type-list {
 list-style: none;
}

.csdm-rel-type-item {
 display: flex;

 gap: 8px;
 padding: 4px 6px;
 margin-bottom: 3px;

 border-radius: 3px;
}

.csdm-rel-type-item--ok {
 background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.062745098);
}

.csdm-rel-type-item--warn {

}

.csdm-rel-type-name {
 flex: 1;
 color: #e0e6ff;
}

.csdm-rel-type-count {
 color: #8892b0;
 font-size: 10px;
}

.csdm-rel-type-badge {
 font-size: 12px;

 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 24px;
 padding: 12px 24px;
 background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1230 0%, #1a1f45 100%);
 border-bottom: 1px solid #2a3060;
 flex-shrink: 0;
}

.csdm-header__title h1 {
 font-size: 18px;
 font-weight: 700;
 color: #fff;
 letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

.csdm-header__subtitle {
 font-size: 11px;
 color: #6b7394;
 text-transform: uppercase;
 letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.csdm-header__metrics {
 display: flex;
 gap: 20px;
 margin-left: auto;
}

.csdm-metric {
 text-align: center;
}

.csdm-metric__value {
 display: block;
 font-size: 20px;
 font-weight: 700;
 color: #4488ff;
}

.csdm-metric__value--small {
 font-size: 12px;
 font-weight: 500;
}

.csdm-metric__label {
 font-size: 10px;
 color: #6b7394;
 text-transform: uppercase;
}

.csdm-score--good .csdm-metric__value {
 color: #00e676;
}

.csdm-score--warning .csdm-metric__value {
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-score--critical .csdm-metric__value {
 color: #ff1744;
}

.csdm-metric--risk .csdm-metric__value {
 color: #ff8800;
}

.csdm-metric--time .csdm-metric__value {
 color: #80cbc4;
}

.csdm-header__nav {
 display: flex;
 gap: 4px;
 align-items: center;
}

.csdm-nav-btn {
 padding: 6px 14px;
 border: 1px solid #2a3060;
 border-radius: 4px;
 background: transparent;
 color: #8892b0;
 font-size: 12px;
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: all 0.2s;
}

.csdm-nav-btn:hover {
 background: #1a2040;
 color: #fff;
}

.csdm-nav-btn--active {
 background: #4488ff;
 border-color: #4488ff;
 color: #fff;
}

.csdm-scan-btn {
 padding: 8px 18px;
 border: 2px solid #00e676;
 border-radius: 6px;
 background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.1);
 color: #00e676;
 font-size: 13px;
 font-weight: 700;
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: all 0.2s;
 margin-left: 8px;
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 6px;
}

.csdm-scan-btn:hover {
 background: #00e676;
 color: #0a0e27;
 box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.4);
}

.csdm-scan-btn--scanning {
 border-color: #ffab00;
 background: rgba(255, 171, 0, 0.1);
 color: #ffab00;
 cursor: wait;
}

.csdm-scan-btn--scanning:hover {
 background: rgba(255, 171, 0, 0.1);
 color: #ffab00;
 box-shadow: none;
}

.csdm-scan-spinner {
 display: inline-block;
 width: 12px;
 height: 12px;
 border: 2px solid rgba(255, 171, 0, 0.3);
 border-top-color: #ffab00;
 border-radius: 50%;
 animation: scan-spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes scan-spin {
 to {
 transform: rotate(360deg);
 }
}
.csdm-header {
 position: relative;
}

.csdm-metric--score {
 cursor: pointer;
 border-radius: 6px;
 padding: 4px 8px;
 transition: background 0.2s;
}

.csdm-metric--score:hover {
 background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
}

.csdm-score-breakdown {
 position: absolute;
 top: 100%;
 left: 0;
 right: 0;
 background: #0d1230;
 border-top: 1px solid #2a3060;
 border-bottom: 2px solid #4488ff;
 padding: 16px 24px;
 z-index: 200;
 box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

.csdm-breakdown__title {
 font-size: 13px;
 font-weight: 700;
 color: #fff;
 margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__grid {
 display: grid;
 grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
 gap: 12px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__item {
 background: #111832;
 border-radius: 6px;
 padding: 10px 12px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__header {
 display: flex;
 align-items: center;
 gap: 6px;
 margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__icon {
 font-size: 14px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__name {
 flex: 1;
 font-size: 11px;
 font-weight: 600;
 color: #c0c8e4;
}

.csdm-breakdown__score {
 font-size: 14px;
 font-weight: 700;
}

.csdm-breakdown__score.good {
 color: #00e676;
}

.csdm-breakdown__score.warn {
 color: #ffab00;
}

.csdm-breakdown__score.bad {
 color: #ff5252;
}

.csdm-breakdown__bar {
 height: 4px;
 background: #1a2040;
 border-radius: 2px;
 overflow: hidden;
 margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.csdm-breakdown__fill {
 height: 100%;
 border-radius: 2px;
 transition: width 0.5s;
}

.csdm-breakdown__detail {
 font-size: 10px;
 color: #6b7394;
 line-height: 1.3;
}

.csdm-breakdown__weight {
 font-size: 9px;
 color: #4488ff;
 margin-top: 2px;

 margin: 0;
 padding: 0;

.csdm-app {
 display: flex;
 flex-direction: column;
 height: 100vh;
 background: #0a0e27;
 color: #e0e6ff;
 font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
 overflow: hidden;
}

.csdm-main {
 display: flex;
 flex: 1;
 overflow: hidden;
}

.csdm-loading {
 display: flex;
 flex-direction: column;
 align-items: center;
 justify-content: center;
 height: 100vh;
 background: #0a0e27;
 color: #8892b0;
}

.csdm-loading p {
 font-size: 15px;
 color: #c0c8e4;
}

.csdm-loading-sub {
 font-size: 12px;
 color: #555e7a;
 margin-top: 8px;
}

.csdm-loading-spinner {
 width: 40px;
 height: 40px;
 border: 3px solid #1a2040;
 border-top-color: #4488ff;
 border-radius: 50%;
 animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
 margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.csdm-retry-btn {
 margin-top: 16px;
 padding: 10px 24px;
 border: 2px solid #4488ff;
 border-radius: 6px;
 background: rgba(68, 136, 255, 0.1);
 color: #4488ff;
 font-size: 14px;
 font-weight: 600;
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: all 0.2s;
}

.csdm-retry-btn:hover {
 background: #4488ff;
 color: #fff;
}

@keyframes spin {
 to {
 transform: rotate(360deg);
 }
